MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-11-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Samantha I. Pranatadjaja of Radoslovich Parker Turner PC (916.565.8161) appears as counsel for defendant/opposing party, Allied Farmers, Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF CENTRAL VALLEY BUILDERS SUPPLY'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT and alternative motion for summary adjudication are DENIED in their entirety. Ignoring the many procedural deficiencies with the moving papers and assuming without deciding that plaintiff satisfied it burden of production, the motion must still be denied because defendants Allied Framers, Inc. and The Guarantee Company of North America USA have presented sufficient admissible facts showing that there are triable issues: 1) about the amount owed to plaintiff in the absence of any setoff defense and 2) whether delivery terms were incorporated into the parties' contract. These two triable issues preclude summary adjudication of all claims sought to be summarily adjudicated in plaintiff's favor. Written order is signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
